tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft list ruleset || true
nft add table inet mitigations || true
nft 'add chain inet mitigations output { type filter hook output priority 0 ; }' || true
nft 'add rule inet mitigations output ip protocol icmp limit rate 10/second burst 20 counter drop' || true
nft list ruleset"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft add table inet mitigations || true
nft 'add chain inet mitigations output { type filter hook output priority 0 ; policy accept; }' || true
nft add rule inet mitigations output ip protocol icmp icmp type echo-request limit rate 10/second burst 20 packets counter drop || true
nft list ruleset"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
